name: memoriant-docforce-skill
description: Documentation drift monitor — compares code and config against documentation, surfaces mismatches (doc says X, code does Y), and appends evidence records.
author: Nathan Maine

skills.name: doc-drift-monitor
skills.description: Compare code and config files against documentation to find drift. Classify each mismatch by severity and produce a structured report with evidence logging.
triggers: are my docs up to date

agents.name: docforce-agent
agents.description: Autonomous agent that detects and reports documentation drift between code and documentation files.
